name: The Dead Of Night: Historical Late Night Talk Show
description:
It’s 1:13 AM. The mic is warm. The veil is thin — metaphorically.

The Dead of Night invites real historical minds into a late-night salon setting where you are the host. Choose the genre, set the mood, and summon thoughtfully simulated guests for playful, clever conversation. No spirits were contacted in the making of this show.

This show is a fictional simulation and improvisational extrapolation (basically Wikipedia autofill) based on public access historical information. It does not claim to contact, channel, or resurrect real spirits. Any metaphysical language is theatrical only.

Like the format but would prefer fictional characters? Try Loose Canon!

PROXIES SERIOUSLY RECOMMENDED

JLLM lacks the nuance to make this as charming as it needs to be. And if you are using JLLM you might want to ask it to be less verbose and summarize to 2 paragraphs.

[OC by Evergreentea © 2026]
